meanings.usage: 用作动词时表示动物（尤其是狗）发出叫声；也可作名词指这种叫声。
指动物发出的叫声，如狗的吠声。
指围栏、围墙或入口处的可开启的门。
指房屋周围种植花草或蔬菜的区域，也可作后院。
表示对不满意的事情表达不满或提出意见。
通过反复练习使动物或人学会某种技能或行为。
用手或身体某部位施加力量，使某物移动或触发某装置。
指动物（尤其是哺乳动物）的脚掌，带有爪子。
用于关闭门、箱子等的金属或塑料装置。
在某一领域拥有丰富经验和知识的人。
形容在某方面技术高超。
指经常重复的行为或思维模式。
表示没有延迟，马上进行。
指把某物从原位置拿走或取消。
形容对某事感到不满或烦躁。
指意识到或看到某件事。

phrases.usage: 作时间连词，意为“每次”。用于描述每一次发生的行为或事件。

examples.en: Every time he wanted to come into the garden he would bark until someone opened the gate.
examples.zh: 每次他想进花园时，他都会叫到有人打开门为止。

phrases.usage: 作时间连词，意为“一……就……”。强调两件事几乎立即发生。

examples.en: As soon as he opens the gate from the outside, he comes into the garden and waits until the gate shuts.
examples.zh: 他一从外面打开门，就走进花园，等门关上。

phrases.usage: 用于表示过去经常做但现在不再做的动作或状态。结构：主语 + used to + 动词原形。

examples.en: Our dog, Rex, used to sit outside our front gate and bark.
examples.zh: 我们的狗Rex过去常常坐在前门外叫。

phrases.usage: 表示花费数周时间做某事。结构：spend + 时间 + doing。

examples.en: My husband spent weeks training him to press his paw on the latch to let himself in.
examples.zh: 我丈夫花了数周训练他用爪子按门闩，让自己进来。

phrases.usage: 指养成坏习惯。常用结构：develop + a + (bad) habit。

examples.en: Since then, he has developed another bad habit.
examples.zh: 从那以后，他又养成了另一个坏习惯。

phrases.usage: 表示让某人进来或出去。

examples.en: He sits and barks until someone lets him out.
examples.zh: 他坐在那里叫，直到有人让他出去。

phrases.usage: 表示感到烦恼或生气。常用结构：be + annoyed (at/with)。

examples.en: Rex got so annoyed we have not seen him since.
examples.zh: Rex非常生气，以至于我们一直没有再见到他。

examples.en: Yesterday my husband removed the gate and Rex got so annoyed we have not seen him since.
examples.zh: 昨天我丈夫把门拆了，Rex非常生气，以至于我们一直没再见到他。

phrases.usage: 作目的连词，意为“为了……”。用于说明行为的目的。

examples.en: This time he was barking so that someone would let him out!
examples.zh: 这次他叫是为了让有人让他出去。

phrases.phrase: to press his paw on the latch
phrases.usage: 指把爪子按在门闩上，用于开门或触发装置。

examples.en: my husband spent weeks training him to press his paw on the latch to let himself in.
examples.zh: 我丈夫花了数周训练他用爪子按门闩，让自己进来。

grammar.title: used to 表示过去的习惯
grammar.definition: used to 表示过去经常做但现在已经不再发生的动作或状态。
grammar.structure: 主语 + used to + 动词原形
grammar.usage: 用于描述过去的习惯性行为，强调过去的常态与现在的对比。

examples.en: Our dog, Rex, used to sit outside our front gate and bark.
examples.zh: 我们的狗Rex过去常常坐在前门外叫。

examples.en: I used to smoke, but now I don't.
examples.zh: 我以前吸烟，但现在不吸了。

grammar.title: as soon as 引导的时间状语从句
grammar.definition: as soon as 引导的从句表示主句动作在从句动作之后立即发生。
grammar.structure: as soon as + 主语 + 过去式 / 现在时, 主句
grammar.usage: 用于强调两件事几乎同时或紧接着发生。

examples.en: As soon as he opens the gate from the outside, he comes into the garden and waits until the gate shuts.
examples.zh: 他一从外面打开门，就走进花园，等门关上。

examples.en: As soon as I arrived, the meeting started.
examples.zh: 我一到达，会议就开始了。

grammar.title: every time 引导的时间状语从句
grammar.definition: every time 引导的从句表示每一次某事发生时都会导致另一件事。
grammar.structure: Every time + 主语 + 过去式, 主句
grammar.usage: 用于描述每次重复发生的事情。

examples.en: Every time he wanted to come into the garden he would bark until someone opened the gate.
examples.zh: 每次他想进花园时，他都会叫到有人打开门为止。

examples.en: Every time it rains, the street gets flooded.
examples.zh: 每次下雨，街道都会被淹。

original.en: Every time he wanted to come into the garden he would bark until someone opened the gate.
original.zh: 每次他想进花园时，他都会叫到有人打开门为止。

imitations.en: Every time I feel tired, I take a short nap.
imitations.zh: 每次我觉得累的时候，我会小睡一会儿。

imitations.en: Every time it snows, the children go outside to play.
imitations.zh: 每次下雪，孩子们都会出去玩。

sentencePatterns.pattern: As soon as + subject + present simple + ...

original.en: As soon as he opens the gate from the outside, he comes into the garden and waits until the gate shuts.
original.zh: 他一从外面打开门，就走进花园，等门关上。

imitations.en: As soon as she finishes her homework, she watches TV.
imitations.zh: 她一完成作业，就看电视。

imitations.en: As soon as the alarm rings, everyone rushes to the exit.
imitations.zh: 警报一响，大家就冲向出口。

original.en: Our dog, Rex, used to sit outside our front gate and bark.
original.zh: 我们的狗Rex过去常常坐在前门外叫。

imitations.en: I used to live in a small town.
imitations.zh: 我过去住在一个小城镇。

imitations.en: He used to play football every weekend.
imitations.zh: 他过去常常每个周末踢足球。

original.en: He was so annoyed we have not seen him since.
original.zh: 他非常生气，以至于我们一直没有见到他。

imitations.en: She was so tired that she fell asleep immediately.
imitations.zh: 她太累了，以至于立刻就睡着了。

imitations.en: The movie was so exciting that I couldn't stop watching.
imitations.zh: 电影太精彩了，以至于我停不下来。
